title: Adv Tech
body:
### Addon for IC2

## Items
 - Electromagnet
 - Telemagnet
 - Ore dictionary converter
 - Universal charger
 - Ultimate drill

## Features
 - Items can use EU or RF energy.
 - Universal charger can charge items that use either RF or EU.
 - Ultimate drill has upgrades ( https://youtu.be/al72DQv4MoE ).
 - Craft recipes are configurable.
 - IC2 required.

More info (partially outdated): https://forum.industrial-craft.net/thread/12194-ic2-exp-1-7-10-mining-tools/
